SEARCH
Package org.unlaxer.tramli

Class FlowDefinition<S extends Enum<S> & FlowState>

java.lang.Object
org.unlaxer.tramli.FlowDefinition<S>
public final class FlowDefinition<S extends Enum<S> & FlowState> extends Object
Immutable flow definition built via DSL. Validated at build() time with 8 checks. 
 Tramli.define("order", OrderState.class)
     .ttl(Duration.ofMinutes(5))
     .from(CREATED).auto(PAYMENT_PENDING, paymentInit)
     .from(PAYMENT_PENDING).external(CONFIRMED, paymentGuard)
     .from(CONFIRMED).branch(stockCheck)
         .to(SHIPPED, "in_stock", shipProcessor)
         .to(CANCELLED, "out_of_stock", cancelProcessor)
         .endBranch()
     .onAnyError(CANCELLED)
     .build();

    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    FlowDefinition.Builder<S extends Enum<S> & FlowState>
     
    static final record 
    FlowDefinition.BuildResult<S extends Enum<S> & FlowState>
    Result of FlowDefinition.Builder.buildAndValidate(): definition (if valid) + structured errors.
    static final record 
    FlowDefinition.ExceptionRoute<S>
    Route to a specific state based on exception type.
    static final record 
    FlowDefinition.ValidationError
    Structured validation error returned by FlowDefinition.Builder.buildAndValidate().

    • withPlugin

      public FlowDefinition<S> withPlugin(S from, S to, FlowDefinition<?> pluginFlow)
      Create a new FlowDefinition with a sub-flow inserted before a specific transition. The original transition A→B becomes: A→subFlow→(onExit "DONE")→B. Original FlowDefinition is not modified.

    • builder

      public static <S extends Enum<S> & FlowState> FlowDefinition.Builder<S> builder(String name, Class<S> stateClass)
